title: Tab Navigator
description: Create bottom tab bars for switching between main sections.

slides.title: Tabs in Mobile Apps 🗂️
slides.content:
# Bottom Tab Navigation

Many apps have a tab bar at the bottom (Instagram, Twitter) for quickly switching between main sections.

React Navigation provides a **bottom tab navigator** (and a material top tabs).

## Installation

```bash
npm install @react-navigation/bottom-tabs
```

quizData.explanation: The `tabBarIcon` option receives a function that returns the icon component.
